NarrativeTemplate: Day {day}: {director} is replaced. {new_director} takes the chair and the room recalibrates.
Day {day}: two divisions quietly fold their books together. Standing realigns overnight.
Day {day}: a splinter group breaks off, taking budget and grudges with them.
Day {day}: the comptroller's office trims discretionary spend across the division.
Day {day}: an unspent allocation from another division is rerouted to the player's books.
Day {day}: an old operation surfaces in the press. Names are redacted; the date isn't.
Day {day}: a rival faction has been reading the player's mail. Containment is theoretical.
Day {day}: the megacorp's stock moves and every ledger flexes with it.
Day {day}: a late-stage purge. {new_director} arrives with a list and no patience.
Day {day}: an internal auditor leaks. The story has receipts.
